target_en: \"Dis chick's priddy hot y'kno...!
How 'bout we have some fun later... Yee hee hee hee!!\"
\"I always wannid' a cutie ta go out with!!
Huff, huff!\"
\"Huh, well wad'aboud it? Ya can get all prettied up, wear a miniskirt... I'm hyped!!\"
\"Mhaaaaaaa, tight mini's awesum!!\"
\"Mini mini, ohhhh boooy!!
Haahh, yeahhh!!!\"
\"All sexy, from da top to da bottom!
Lots of skin showing! We'll ged her in full moe-mode!!\"
\"Hey, are you out of your mind?!
Don't touch me with those filthy hands!!!\"
\"There's nothing arousing about a tight mini!!!
And exposure should be minimal!!
No matter what!!
That is the ironclad rule!!!
Listen up, you amateurs.
What's the difference between homo sapiens and other animals?
That's right, humans wear clothes!
Human beings without clothes are just animals!!!
Wanting so much exposed skin makes you less than human!!
You might as well be animals!!
I'm going to knock some sense into you!!
Clench those teeth!!!\"
\"You mentioned tight miniskirts, didn't you?
Let's say there's a beautiful young lady right here.
The definition of 'beauty' is too broad.
To lecture on that subject is as difficult as explaining samurai values to a foreigner starting from sushi, mountains, and geisha!!
So, I'll limit the scope to the most popular one, school uniforms!!
What are the three most prominent divisions in the larger category of school uniforms?!!!
Answer me!!!
Hey you, delinquent A!! You take the regular uniform!
Delinquent B! You take the gym uniform.
And, you, delinquent C, you take the school swimsuit!!!
Let's say there's a a beautiful young lady here wearing those very clothes.
Use your imagination.
Come on!!
Say 'sir, yes, sir' when you got it!!!
Are you really military men, you maggots?!!
Good, you all seem to have an image in your heads now. Let's move on.
Now just imagine and compare your moe-costume with that erotic outfit with the tight miniskirt your stupid desires conjured up!
Well!? It doesn't work, does it!!!
Sexy and moe are on completely different vectors - they're like water and oil!!!
The number of immature folk who don't know the difference has been increasing recently, it's truly lamentable!
Sexiness is instinctual, but moe comes from a world of delicate and rustic sensibilities!!
If the only way you can see a ladies charm is through instinct, you're a pack of dogs, monkeys, or pheasants!
Incidentally, a huge amount of varied 'moe' is going around lately thanks to the recent thawing of East-West relations.
You don't know that? Get out of here!!
I heard that there's even a genre combining school uniforms with blond hair, like combining oxygen with hydrogen to get a cute explosion! But I'll never accept that!!!
There's no room in this world for combining Western and Japanese culture!!!
Are you listening?!
You pathetic squid!!!
Clench your teeth, I'll train you 'til you drop!!!
I won't let you sleep until you've truly understood moe culture!!!
